_comment: Documentation of AI Gateway settings. The gateway reads ENV (REDACTWALL_*, with PROMPTWALL_*/SENTINEL_* legacy aliases), not this file. Copy values into .env or your process manager.
INGEST_API_KEY: <same ingest key the control plane uses for /api/v1/*>
_mock_comment: The mock provider is for local and CI verification only and is rejected when NODE_ENV=production.
_upstream_comment: GATEWAY_UPSTREAM_URL is required for internal-http, which never falls back to api.openai.com. Azure OpenAI is not advertised because its deployment path, api-version query, and api-key contract are not implemented by this adapter.
_upstream_key_comment: GATEWAY_UPSTREAM_API_KEY is required for openai and anthropic; internal-http is the explicit no-auth provider.
